top_tweets.text:
anthropic's head of product just revealed how they're able to ship faster than any other AI company.

their secret: "side quest maxxing."

here's how it works:

anyone on the team gets full freedom https://t.co/m9Og5wfE2k
top_tweets.author: itsolelehmann
top_tweets.name: Ole Lehmann
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 產品主管揭露其快速出貨的秘訣：「side quest maxxing」——團隊成員擁有完全自由進行無計畫的下午實驗，而非依賴長期路線圖。這種靈活的產品開發文化讓他們能比其他 AI 公司更快迭代。

top_tweets.text:
the polymath is not a person who collects hobbies.

it is a person who refuses artificial borders.

• art and science
• engineering and philosophy
• history and design

for most of history, these were not separate worlds.

the polymath by peter burke shows that broad thinkers https://t.co/saQCyt6gfL
top_tweets.author: oprydai
top_tweets.name: Mustafa
top_tweets.summary_zh: 博學者（polymath）不是收集嗜好的人，而是拒絕人為界線的人——藝術與科學、工程與哲學、歷史與設計在歷史多數時期本就不是分離的領域。

top_tweets.text:

claude code and codex have not met my expectations of what’s in my minds eye to what they produce.

looking for suggest or pitches…. ideas?

top_tweets.text: sniffies has made the worst decision ever to take investment from match group a dating app monopoly that pushes aggressive monetisation on tinder, hinge and ok Cupid through gamified design and cheap dopamine rewards that keep users hooked to apps and not actually ‘matching’ https://t.co/WscAolV1Wx
top_tweets.author: donjackoghue
top_tweets.name: don jackoghue
top_tweets.summary_zh: 約會應用 Sniffies 接受 Match Group 投資被批評為最糟決策，Match Group 旗下 Tinder、Hinge 等產品以遊戲化設計和廉價多巴胺機制推動激進變現，讓用戶沉迷而非真正配對。

top_tweets.text: Thing is... This is PRECISELY what AI should be used for! It removes and reduces 0 creativity, it just makes the final product look better.

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
